title: LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions:
LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions!
